Home.title: IT Engineer & Consultant
Home.bio: With a Master's degree from the University of Tokyo and a background in end-to-end IT solution consulting at Deloitte, I am dedicated to solving complex business challenges through technology. Outside of work, I build quirky side projects and travel across all 47 prefectures of Japan and beyond, documenting my journey through the lens of my camera.

profile.title: Profile
profile.desc: My educational background and professional journey.

lab.title: Labs
lab.desc: A collection of interesting engineering experiments. Perhaps not always practical, but definitely fun.

travel.title: Photography
travel.desc: Travel memories across Japan and the world, captured through the lens of a Fujifilm X-S20.

deloitte.name: Deloitte Tohmatsu Akt
deloitte.title: Delivery Analyst
deloitte.desc: Led digital transformation consulting and development implementation based on the Salesforce platform, delivering end-to-end solutions from upstream strategy to downstream execution.

utokyo.name: The University of Tokyo, Graduate School of Engineering
utokyo.thesis_title: A Scoring Model for Welding Training Utilizing Machine Learning to Model Embodied Knowledge

whu.name: Wuhan University, School of Electronic Information
whu.thesis_title: Monocular Camera Depth Prediction Model Based on Deep Learning

LabPage.title: Labs
LabPage.description: A collection of my development experiments, automation plugins, and personal utility tools. Most were built to solve real-life needs and serve as a playground for exploring new tech stacks.

kyushu-travel-planner.title: Personal Travel Planner Web App (Kyushu Edition)
kyushu-travel-planner.description: A utility tool designed specifically for personal travel. It supports dynamic itinerary adjustments and real-time expense tracking, solving the hassle of budget management and bill splitting during trips.
